title: polygala robinsonii
intro: Polygala robinsonii, also known as Yuan Zhi or Polygala root, is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Polygala robinsonii include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress, and enhanced cognitive function, making it a popular remedy for insomnia and nervous disorders. In herbal preparations, Polygala root is often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or infusions.
